schemaText:
datasource db {
  provider = "postgresql"
}

generator client {
  provider = "prisma-client-js"
}

enum UserRole {
  USER
  ADMIN
}

enum UserType {
  INHOUSE
  AGENCY
}

enum Provider {
  credential
  google
  kakao
  naver
}

enum WasteIndustryType {
  INTERMEDIATE_RECYCLING
  COMPREHENSIVE_RECYCLING
  FINAL_RECYCLING
  INTERMEDIATE_DISPOSAL
  FINAL_DISPOSAL
  TRANSPORT
}

enum ProfileScope {
  BUSINESS
  CATEGORY
  DOCUMENT
}

enum DocumentType {
  EMISSION_AIR_DOC
  EMISSION_WATER_DOC
  EMISSION_NOISE_DOC
  EMISSION_SMELL_DOC
  WASTE_PERMIT_DOC
  WASTE_REPORT_TRANSPORT_DOC
  WASTE_REPORT_RECYCLE_DOC
  WASTE_REPORT_DISPOSAL_DOC
  WASTE_APPROVAL_DISPOSAL_DOC
  WASTE_REPORT_EMITTER_DOC
  WASTE_STARTUP_DOC
  LOGS_AIR
  LOGS_WATER
  GAPZI
}

enum DocumentRequestStatus {
  PENDING
  IN_PROGRESS
  COMPLETED
  CANCELLED
  FAILED
}

enum ChangeType {
  NEW
  UPDATE
  EXPANSION
  CLOSE
}

enum BottomShape {
  CIRCLE
  RECT
  TRIANGLE
  TRAPEZOID
  MANUAL
}

enum MaterialType {
  RAW_MATERIAL
  FUEL
}

enum PollutantContext {
  FACILITY
  HOOD
  PRE
  POST
}

model User {
  id                      String @id @default(cuid())
  username                String? // PostgreSQL Partial Index 수동 설정함 (값이 있을 땐 Unique하되 Null은 중복 가능하도록!)
  displayUsername         String?
  email                   String @unique
  emailVerified           Boolean @default(false)
  phoneNumber             String?
  name                    String
  role                    UserRole @default(USER)
  userType                UserType? // 소셜 로그인 시 null로 기본 저장, credential에서는 필수
  isProfileComplete       Boolean @default(false) // email, name, userType이 모두 존재할 때만 isProfileComplete를 true로 설정 (그 외의 경우에는 false)
  sessions                Session[]
  accounts                Account[]
  posts                   Post[]
  businesses              Business[]
  documentRequests        DocumentRequest[]
  createdAt               DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt               DateTime @updatedAt

  @@map("users")
}

model Session {
  id                      String @id @default(cuid())
  userId                  String
  token                   String @unique
  ipAddress               String?
  userAgent               String?
  user                    User @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  expiresAt               DateTime
  createdAt               DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt               DateTime @updatedAt

  @@index([userId, token])
  @@map("sessions")
}

model Account {
  id                      String @id @default(cuid())
  userId                  String
  accountId               String
  providerId              Provider
  accessToken             String?
  refreshToken            String?
  accessTokenExpiresAt    DateTime?
  refreshTokenExpiresAt   DateTime?
  scope                   String?
  idToken                 String?
  password                String?
  user                    User @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  createdAt               DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt               DateTime @updatedAt

  @@index([userId])
  @@map("accounts")
}

model Verification {
  id                      String @id @default(cuid())
  identifier              String
  value                   String
  expiresAt               DateTime
  createdAt               DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt               DateTime @updatedAt

  @@index([identifier])
  @@map("verifications")
}

model VerifiedEmail {
  id                      String @id @default(cuid())
  email                   String @unique
  expiresAt               DateTime
  createdAt               DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt               DateTime @updatedAt

  @@map("verified_emails")
}

model Post {
  id                      String @id @default(cuid())
  authorId                String
  slug                    String @unique
  title                   String
  content                 String @db
  published               Boolean @default(false)
  excerpt                 String? @db
  isFeatured              Boolean @default(false)
  author                  User @relation(fields: [authorId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  tags                    Tag[]
  createdAt               DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt               DateTime @updatedAt

  @@map("posts")
}

model Tag {
  id                      String @id @default(cuid())
  name                    String @unique
  slug                    String @unique
  posts                   Post[]
  createdAt               DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt               DateTime @updatedAt

  @@map("tags")
}

model Business {
  id                      String @id @default(cuid())
  businessName            String
  ownerName               String?
  ownerBirthdate          DateTime?
  businessRegNumber       String
  corporationRegNumber    String?
  businessAddress         String?
  businessPhone           String?
  mobilePhone             String?
  mainProduct             String?
  industryTypeCode        String?
  industryTypeName        String?
  wasteIndustryType       WasteIndustryType?
  userId                  String
  user                    User @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  documentProfiles        BusinessDocumentProfile[]
  processFlows            ProcessFlow[]
  productionFacilities    ProductionFacility[]
  controlFacilities       ControlFacility[]
  wasteDocumentations     WasteDocumentation[]
  executiveOfficers       ExecutiveOfficer[]
  rawMaterialUsages       RawMaterialUsage[]
  landInfos               LandInfo[]
  buildingInfos           BuildingInfo[]
  temporaryBuildingInfos  TemporaryBuildingInfo[]
  createdAt               DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt               DateTime @updatedAt
  waterDocumentations     WaterDocumentation[]
  odorDocumentations      OdorDocumentation[]
  noiseDocumentations     NoiseDocumentation[]
  airDocumentations       AirDocumentation[]

  @@map("businesses")
}

model BusinessDocumentProfile {
  id                      String @id @default(cuid())
  businessId              String
  profileScope            ProfileScope @default(DOCUMENT)
  documentCategoryCode    String? // 서류 대분류 코드 (예: "E01", "W01")
  documentSubCategoryCode String? // 서류 중분류 코드 (예: "TR", "IR" 등)
  documentCode            String? // 서류 코드 (예: "E01-IR", "W01-TR-CP")
  submissionOffice        String? // 제출청
  mainProcess             String? // 공정
  specificData            Json? // 특정 서류 코드에 대한 추가 데이터
  business                Business @relation(fields: [businessId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  createdAt               DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt               DateTime @updatedAt

  @@unique([businessId, profileScope, documentCategoryCode, documentSubCategoryCode, documentCode]) // 한 사업장은 (profileScope + documentCategoryCode + documentSubCategoryCode + documentCode) 조합당 하나의 프로필만 가질 수 있음
  @@map("business_document_profiles")
}

model DocumentRequest {
  id                      String @id @default(cuid())
  documentType            DocumentType
  status                  DocumentRequestStatus @default(PENDING)
  memo                    String?
  payload                 DocumentPayload?
  completedAt             DateTime?
  s3Key                   String?
  userId                  String
  user                    User @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  createdAt               DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt               DateTime @updatedAt

  @@map("document_requests")
}

model DocumentPayload {
  id                      String @id @default(cuid())
  requestId               String @unique
  request                 DocumentRequest @relation(fields: [requestId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  data                    Json
  createdAt               DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt               DateTime @updatedAt

  @@map("document_payloads")
}

model ProcessFlow {
  id                      String @id @default(cuid())
  businessId              String
  layoutData              Json?
  productionFacilities    ProductionFacility[]
  controlFacilities       ControlFacility[]
  business                Business @relation(fields: [businessId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  createdAt               DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt               DateTime @updatedAt

  @@map("process_flows")
}

model ControlFacility {
  id                      String @id @default(cuid())
  businessId              String
  facilityNumber          String
  facilityName            String
  size                    String?
  specification           String?
  isAirControlFacility    Boolean @default(false)
  airEmissionOutletNumber String?
  airEmissionOutletOrder  Int?
  isWaterControlFacility  Boolean @default(false)
  isSmellControlFacility  Boolean @default(false)
  isNoiseControlFacility  Boolean @default(false)
  facilityPrice           String?
  installedBuilding       String?
  manufacturer            String?
  phoneNumber             String?
  changeType              ChangeType @default(NEW)
  memo                    String?
  business                Business @relation(fields: [businessId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  processFlows            ProcessFlow[]
  createdAt               DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt               DateTime @updatedAt

  @@map("control_facilities")
}

model ProductionFacility {
  id                      String @id @default(cuid())
  businessId              String
  facilityNumber          String
  facilityName            String
  process                 String?
  size                    String?
  specification           String?
  quantity                Int?
  isWasteFacility         Boolean @default(false)
  isAirEmissionFacility   Boolean @default(false)
  airEmissionOutletNumber String?
  isWaterEmissionFacility Boolean @default(false)
  isSmellEmissionFacility Boolean @default(false)
  isNoiseEmissionFacility Boolean @default(false)
  facilityPrice           String?
  installedBuilding       String?
  manufacturer            String?
  phoneNumber             String?
  changeType              ChangeType @default(NEW)
  memo                    String?
  asWasteFacility         WasteFacility?
  business                Business @relation(fields: [businessId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  processFlows            ProcessFlow[]
  createdAt               DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt               DateTime @updatedAt

  @@map("production_facilities")
}

model WasteDocumentation {
  id                      String @id @default(cuid())
  businessId              String
  wasteTargetItems        WasteTargetItem[]
  wasteFacilities         WasteFacility[]
  wasteStorageFacilities  WasteStorageFacility[]
  business                Business @relation(fields: [businessId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  createdAt               DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt               DateTime @updatedAt
  office                  Office? @relation(fields: [officeId], references: [id])
  officeId                String?
  vehicle                 Vehicle? @relation(fields: [vehicleId], references: [id])
  vehicleId               String?
  executiveOfficerId      String?

  @@map("waste_documentations")
}

model WasteTargetItem {
  id                      String @id @default(cuid())
  wasteDocumentationId    String
  wasteCode               String?
  wasteName               String?
  preAnalysisRequired     Boolean @default(false)
  recyclingCode           String?
  recycledProduct         String?
  throughput              Float?
  changeType              ChangeType @default(NEW)
  wasteDocumentation      WasteDocumentation @relation(fields: [wasteDocumentationId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  storedIn                WasteStorageFacility[]

  @@map("waste_target_items")
}

model WasteFacility {
  id                      String @id @default(cuid())
  wasteDocumentationId    String
  productionFacilityId    String @unique
  capacityPerHour         Float?
  dailyOperatingHours     Float?
  dailyThroughput         Float?
  productionFacility      ProductionFacility? @relation(fields: [productionFacilityId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  wasteDocumentation      WasteDocumentation @relation(fields: [wasteDocumentationId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@map("waste_facilities")
}

model WasteStorageFacility {
  id                      String @id @default(cuid())
  wasteDocumentationId    String
  targetWasteId           String?
  targetWaste             WasteTargetItem? @relation(fields: [targetWasteId], references: [id])
  specificGravity         String?
  bottomShape             BottomShape?
  diameter                Float?
  width                   Float?
  length                  Float?
  topSide                 Float?
  bottomSide              Float?
  verticalSide            Float?
  height                  Float?
  quantity                Int?
  volume                  Float?
  storageAmount           Float?
  storageDays             Float?
  changeType              ChangeType @default(NEW)
  wasteDocumentation      WasteDocumentation @relation(fields: [wasteDocumentationId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@map("waste_storage_facilities")
}

model ExecutiveOfficer {
  id                      String @id @default(cuid())
  businessId              String
  name                    String?
  residentIdNumber        String?
  registrationAddress     String?
  phoneNumber             String?
  position                String?
  changeType              ChangeType @default(NEW)
  business                Business @relation(fields: [businessId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  createdAt               DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt               DateTime @updatedAt

  @@map("executive_officers")
}

model Vehicle {
  id                      String @id @default(cuid())
  businessId              String
  vehicleName             String?
  vehicleType             String?
  maxPayload              String?
  ownerRegistrationNumber String?
  manufacturer            String?
  modelApprovalNumber     String?
  changeType              ChangeType @default(NEW)
  wasteDocumentations     WasteDocumentation[]
  createdAt               DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt               DateTime @updatedAt

  @@map("vehicles")
}

model Office {
  id                      String @id @default(cuid())
  businessId              String
  officeAddress           String?
  officeArea              String?
  contactNumber           String?
  changeType              ChangeType @default(NEW)
  wasteDocumentations     WasteDocumentation[]
  createdAt               DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt               DateTime @updatedAt

  @@map("offices")
}

model RawMaterialUsage {
  id                      String @id @default(cuid())
  businessId              String
  materialType            MaterialType
  materialName            String
  dailyUsage              Float?
  monthlyOperatingDays    Int?
  monthlyUsage            Float?
  annualOperatingDays     Int?
  annualUsage             Float?
  business                Business @relation(fields: [businessId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  createdAt               DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt               DateTime @updatedAt

  @@map("raw_material_usages")
}

model LandInfo {
  id                      String @id @default(cuid())
  businessId              String
  lotNumber               String?
  landCategory            String?
  area                    Float?
  business                Business @relation(fields: [businessId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  createdAt               DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt               DateTime @updatedAt

  @@map("land_infos")
}

model BuildingInfo {
  id                      String @id @default(cuid())
  businessId              String
  dong                    String?
  floors                  Int?
  purpose                 String?
  area                    Float?
  business                Business @relation(fields: [businessId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  createdAt               DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt               DateTime @updatedAt

  @@map("building_infos")
}

model TemporaryBuildingInfo {
  id                      String @id @default(cuid())
  businessId              String
  reportNumber            String?
  dong                    String?
  floors                  Int?
  purpose                 String?
  structure               String?
  area                    Float?
  business                Business @relation(fields: [businessId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  createdAt               DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt               DateTime @updatedAt

  @@map("temporary_building_infos")
}

model WaterDocumentation {
  id                      String @id @default(cuid())
  businessId              String
  business                Business @relation(fields: [businessId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  createdAt               DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt               DateTime @updatedAt

  @@map("water_documentations")
}

model OdorDocumentation {
  id                      String @id @default(cuid())
  businessId              String
  business                Business @relation(fields: [businessId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  createdAt               DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt               DateTime @updatedAt

  @@map("odor_documentations")
}

model NoiseDocumentation {
  id                      String @id @default(cuid())
  businessId              String
  business                Business @relation(fields: [businessId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  createdAt               DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt               DateTime @updatedAt

  @@map("noise_documentations")
}

model AirDocumentation {
  id                      String @id @default(cuid())
  businessId              String
  business                Business @relation(fields: [businessId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  airEmissionFacilities   AirEmissionFacility[]
  airControlFacilities    AirControlFacility[]
  createdAt               DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt               DateTime @updatedAt

  @@map("air_documentations")
}
model AirEmissionFacility {
  id                    String @id @default(cuid())
  airDocumentationId    String
  productionFacilityId  String?
  facilityNumber        String?
  power                 String?
  size                  String?
  category              String?
  rawMaterial           String?
  rawMaterialUsage      Float?
  fuel                  String?
  fuelUsage             Float?
  dailyOperatingHours   Float?
  annualOperatingDays   Int?
  airDocumentation      AirDocumentation @relation(fields: [airDocumentationId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  productionFacility    ProductionFacility? @relation(fields: [productionFacilityId], references: [id])
  hoods                 Hood[]
  pollutants            Pollutant[]
  createdAt             DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt             DateTime @updatedAt

  @@map("air_emission_facilities")
}

model Hood {
  id                    String @id @default(cuid())
  airEmissionFacilityId String
  airControlFacilityId  String?
  emissionOutletNumber  String?
  airEmissionFacility   AirEmissionFacility @relation(fields: [airEmissionFacilityId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  airControlFacility    AirControlFacility? @relation(fields: [airControlFacilityId], references: [id])
  pollutants            Pollutant[]
  createdAt             DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt             DateTime @updatedAt

  @@map("hoods")
}

model AirControlFacility {
  id                 String @id @default(cuid())
  airDocumentationId String
  controlFacilityId  String?
  airDocumentation   AirDocumentation @relation(fields: [airDocumentationId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  controlFacility    ControlFacility? @relation(fields: [controlFacilityId], references: [id])
  hoods              Hood[]
  pollutants         Pollutant[]
  createdAt          DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt          DateTime @updatedAt

  @@map("air_control_facilities")
}

model Pollutant {
  id                    String @id @default(cuid())
  name                  String
  concentration         Float?
  unit                  String?
  context               PollutantContext
  airEmissionFacilityId String?
  hoodId                String?
  airControlFacilityId  String?
  airEmissionFacility   AirEmissionFacility? @relation(fields: [airEmissionFacilityId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  hood                  Hood? @relation(fields: [hoodId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  airControlFacility    AirControlFacility? @relation(fields: [airControlFacilityId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@map("pollutants")
}

todoItems.title: 대기서류 - AirEmissionFacility 고유 필드 확정
todoItems.body:
배출시설 전용 필드 중 동력, 구분 등 세부 단위/타입 확정 필요
현재: power, size, category, rawMaterial, rawMaterialUsage, fuel, fuelUsage, dailyOperatingHours, annualOperatingDays
→ 각 필드 타입(String/Float/Int) 및 단위 확정 후 반영

todoItems.title: 대기서류 - AirControlFacility 고유 필드 추가
todoItems.body:
방지시설 대기 전용 추가 필드 미확정
ControlFacility 기본 필드 외 대기서류에서만 필요한 항목 확인 후 추가
→ 처리 방식, 용량, 효율 등 검토 필요

todoItems.title: 폐수서류 - WaterDocumentation 하위 구조 설계
todoItems.body:
현재 WaterDocumentation은 기본 구조만 존재
대기서류 패턴 참고하여 설계:
- WaterEmissionFacility (배출시설 → ProductionFacility 참조)
- WaterControlFacility (방지시설 → ControlFacility 참조)
- 오염물질은 공통 Pollutant 모델 재사용 (FK 추가 필요)

todoItems.title: 악취서류 - OdorDocumentation 하위 구조 설계
todoItems.body:
현재 OdorDocumentation은 기본 구조만 존재
악취 특유 항목(복합악취, 지정악취물질) 확인 필요
대기서류 패턴 참고하여 구성

todoItems.title: 소음진동서류 - NoiseDocumentation 하위 구조 설계
todoItems.body:
현재 NoiseDocumentation은 기본 구조만 존재
소음/진동 측정 단위 및 항목 특성 확인 후 설계

todoItems.title: Pollutant - 폐수/악취 서류 FK 추가
todoItems.body:
현재 Pollutant는 대기서류 FK만 있음
- airEmissionFacilityId, hoodId, airControlFacilityId
폐수/악취 서류 설계 완료 후 해당 FK 추가

todoItems.title: 사업장 기본정보 - 나머지 하위 모델 필드 검토
todoItems.body:
Vehicle: vehicleRegistrationNumber 필드 누락 확인
ExecutiveOfficer: 임원 정보 필드 완성도 검토
Office: 현재 officeAddress, officeArea, contactNumber - 추가 필드 없는지 확인

suggestItems.author: Moody
suggestItems.title: [설계 원칙] 사업장(Business) 격리
suggestItems.body:
모든 데이터는 Business를 루트로 직접 또는 간접 연결
- 직접 소유: ProcessFlow, ProductionFacility, ControlFacility, *Documentation 등
- 간접 소유: 역순으로 타고 올라가면 Business에 도달 가능하면 OK
- 직접 FK가 중복되면 제거 (WasteFacility.businessId 제거 사례)
→ WasteFacility → WasteDocumentation → Business 로 충분

suggestItems.author: Moody
suggestItems.title: [설계 원칙] 시설 마스터 데이터 패턴
suggestItems.body:
생산시설(ProductionFacility), 방지시설(ControlFacility)은 Business 직속 마스터 데이터
→ 각 서류에서 참조(Reference)하는 방식으로 재사용

대기서류 예시:
  ProductionFacility (마스터) ← AirEmissionFacility 참조
  ControlFacility (마스터)    ← AirControlFacility 참조

동일 패턴: 폐수, 악취, 소음진동 서류도 같은 방식 적용

suggestItems.author: Moody
suggestItems.title: [설계 원칙] 공정도(ProcessFlow)와 시설의 관계
suggestItems.body:
공정도는 유저와의 UI 창구 (다이어그램 캔버스)
시설은 Business 소속 마스터 데이터

관계: M:N (implicit)
- 공정도 생성 시 기존 시설 참조 또는 신규 생성 가능
- 같은 시설이 여러 공정도에 등장 가능
- 시설 위치/노드/선은 ProcessFlow.layoutData(Json)에 저장

suggestItems.author: Moody
suggestItems.title: [설계 결정] 대기서류 구조: 배출시설-후드-방지시설
suggestItems.body:
핵심 흐름: 배출시설 → 후드(최소단위) → 방지시설

AirDocumentation
 ├── AirEmissionFacility[] (배출시설)
 │     ├── → ProductionFacility 참조
 │     ├── rawMaterialUsage 등 고유 필드 (하위 후드 전체 공유)
 │     ├── Hood[]
 │     └── Pollutant[] (FACILITY context)
 │
 ├── AirControlFacility[] (방지시설)
 │     ├── → ControlFacility 참조
 │     └── Pollutant[] (PRE/POST context)
 │
 └── Hood (배출시설↔방지시설 연결 최소단위)
       ├── airEmissionFacilityId (어디서 왔는지)
       ├── airControlFacilityId + emissionOutletNumber (어디로 나가는지)
       └── Pollutant[] (HOOD context)

suggestItems.author: Moody
suggestItems.title: [설계 결정] 오염물질(Pollutant) 공통 모델
suggestItems.body:
{오염물질명, 농도, 단위}는 대기/폐수/악취 공통 구조
→ 하나의 Pollutant 모델로 통합, PollutantContext enum으로 단계 구분

PollutantContext:
  FACILITY  - 배출시설 단위 오염물질
  HOOD      - 후드 단위 오염물질
  PRE       - 방지시설 처리 전
  POST      - 방지시설 처리 후

원료사용량은 AirEmissionFacility 레벨에 위치
→ 같은 배출시설 소속 후드는 모두 공유 (앱 레이어에서 참조)

suggestItems.author: Moody
suggestItems.title: [설계 결정] 폐기물서류 구조
suggestItems.body:
WasteDocumentation (Business 직속)
 ├── WasteTargetItem[] - 폐기물 대상 품목
 ├── WasteFacility[]   - 생산시설을 폐기물 처리시설로 사용 시 추가 데이터
 │     └── → ProductionFacility 참조 (1:1)
 └── WasteStorageFacility[] - 폐기물 보관시설

폐기물업종 중 수집운반업(TRANSPORT):
→ 시설 정보 대신 Vehicle 정보만 사용
→ WasteDocumentation이 Vehicle을 optional FK로 참조
→ Business.wasteIndustryType으로 앱에서 분기
